properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Into your presence Lord Time after time I've come And through Thy word I hear You've changed And transformed me And Lord my desire Has turned heavenly I am longing to be like You Your very own image Your own likeness Lord I want to stand

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: From perfect faith to perfect love Lord my soul is coming up For this is the day and the hour Of my translation You said "fear not" to me All I require That you will do unto me Oh Lord I believe I'm coming to perfection

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Who am I dear Lord That thou take knowledge of me This Moabitish damsel Has truly found favor with thee For Lord you look beyond my faults And you saw I was in need The price of redemption You willingly paid To redeem me

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh cover me, dear Lord With Thy great love For Thou art my Kinsman Redeemer You're the great and mighty One Now I am a virtuous woman Your bride at Your side I've come into union with You, Lord I've found full redemption
